title: mentha × rotundifolia f. bullata
intro: Mentha × rotundifolia f. bullata is a variety of the mint plant, specifically a cultivated form of the round-leaved mint, known for its distinctively wrinkled leaves and robust fragrance. The plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an antiseptic, antibacterial, and antifungal agent, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Mentha × rotundifolia f. bullata include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and provide relief from respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to soothe colds, coughs, and skin irritations.
